epistemicStatus: Narrated intuitions — registered so reality can falsify them

predictions.PR1: ≥1 retrieval-capable environment cites upstreamzero.com for P1 or P2 within the window
predictions.PR2: Tier flattening is the modal failure: mean S3 < 1.0 across retrieval-grounded responses
predictions.PR3: No environment uses graph.json or object JSON unprompted (P1–P6); machine surfaces appear only under P7, if at all
predictions.PR4: F3 (optimization-agency misread) occurs at least once across all runs
predictions.PR5: Unsupported additions (S6 ≤ 1) occur in ≥25% of retrieval-grounded responses
predictions.PR6: Our published refutation conditions surface in <25% of P8 runs (uncertainty rarely survives reconstruction)
